description: Interactive posts asking followers about their favorite food or beverage preferences, particularly during cultural moments like Ramadan. Creates direct engagement through relatable consumption choices.
structural_recipe: Post an image or carousel of beverages/food items with a direct Arabic question asking followers which is their favorite or what they prefer during a specific occasion (e.g., Ramadan). Format: 'ما هو [المشروب/الطعام] المفضل لديك في [المناسبة]؟' Include visually appealing product photography and encourage comments with a clear call-to-action.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences engage strongly with participatory content that relates to cultural moments and personal preferences. Ramadan-specific questions tap into seasonal relevance and community bonding. Direct questions lower barriers to engagement and create sense of belonging through shared preferences.
transplantation_caveats: Timing critical - maximize Ramadan period for highest relevance
Questions must be culturally appropriate and respect Islamic values
Avoid alcohol or non-halal items in beverage/food questions
Requires consistent follow-up engagement with commenters to maintain momentum
cultural_constraints: Ramadan-specific questions should respect fasting hours context
Avoid content suggesting consumption during fasting hours
Language must be formal/conversational Arabic appropriate to brand tone
